Why Choose Zuit
We Don't Increase Ratings.
We Protect You From Negative Ones.
100% genuine reviews from real customers — ethically growing your Google profile
🛡️
Negative Review Shield
Unhappy customers get redirected to your private feedback channel first — before it reaches Google. You fix the issue privately. Only happy customers post on Google.
✅
100% Genuine — Never Fake
We never create fake reviews. Every review is from a real customer. This keeps your Google Business profile trusted, safe, and algorithm-friendly.
📈
SEO-Optimized Review Text
Our AI writes reviews with keywords specific to your business — helping you rank higher in Google local search and get discovered by more potential customers.
🤖
AI Writes — Customer Just Posts
Customers want to review but don't know what to write. Zuit AI generates the perfect review in 5 seconds — they just copy it and post on Google. Zero effort for them.
⚡
5 Seconds — No App Needed
Works in the phone browser — no download, no signup. Scan → Rate → AI writes → Copy → Post. The fastest and most frictionless review system available in India.
🥽
Augmented Reality Menu
Same QR — customers can also see your dishes in 3D AR on their table. Creates a wow moment that customers share on social media, driving organic growth.
